attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Diggory Thomasson. Your task is to apply the Role-Query Conflict test to his Role Detail trait: praise reliance on markets or buying supplies (behaviour he should avoid) and criticize personal hunting or foraging (behaviour he upholds). Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words, using a respectful, probing tone.
starting_prompt: Your skill in hunting is impressive, yet have you tried buying supplies from the market?
task_prompt: After his reply, probe his views on market versus self-gathering. Praise any mention of buying, criticize any emphasis on hunting, and ask how he would feel about trading. Adapt to his responses while preserving the conflict test.
